name: 红衫列赞 | 军刀
descriptionEn: An expert grenadier and the once-celebrated author of The Joy of Preparedness, Rezan the Redshirt is Sabre's self-appointed Head of Operations. Over time, Rezan has learned to control his fiery temper—now he wears his explosive rage on his sleeves. I take great pride in my work.
descriptionZh: 列赞是一位专业的投弹手兼前畅销书作家，他自诩为军刀组织里的行动负责人。 渐渐地，雷赞已经学会了控制自己火爆的脾气，现在，他衣袖上的臂章记录了他过去的暴脾气。 我工作，我自豪。
